benchmark: CIS Amazon Web Services Foundations Benchmark

1.4.title: Ensure no 'root' user account access key exists / MFA on root

1.16.title: Ensure IAM policies are attached only to groups or roles

1.20.title: Ensure Secrets Manager secrets are encrypted and rotated

2.1.1.title: Ensure S3 bucket server-side encryption is enabled

2.1.2.title: Ensure S3 bucket public access is blocked

2.2.1.title: Ensure EBS volume encryption is enabled

2.3.1.title: Ensure RDS encryption at rest is enabled

2.3.3.title: Ensure RDS instances are not publicly accessible

3.1.title: Ensure CloudTrail is enabled in all regions

3.7.title: Ensure CloudTrail logs S3 bucket is not publicly accessible

3.8.title: Ensure CloudTrail logs are encrypted at rest with KMS CMK

4.1.title: Ensure no security group allows 0.0.0.0/0 to port 22

4.2.title: Ensure no security group allows 0.0.0.0/0 to port 3389

4.3.title: Ensure the default security group restricts all traffic

5.1.title: Ensure no Network ACL allows unrestricted ingress

5.2.title: Ensure VPC flow logging is enabled in all VPCs
